what_worked: MD5 checksum comparison to verify images were already correct
System.Drawing resize + JPEG recompress in PowerShell (no external tools needed)
Xiaosong's hero-bg.jpg pick (177KB) was already optimized — kept as-is
what_failed: EBUSY error during next build export (dev server holds out/ folder lock)
slack-notify.ps1 doesn't detect @RoleName - must use Slack Bot User IDs like <@U0AGND9JG4B>
lesson: Verify actual file contents (MD5) before assuming 'wrong images'. EBUSY on next build with running dev server is expected Windows behavior - build still compiled cleanly. Always use Bot User IDs for @mentions in slack-notify.ps1.
